# Piece Work Pro

> Piece work tracking and payroll software for contractors. Track piece work, run payroll in minutes, and know what every job costs.

## About

Piece Work Pro is a SaaS application built for contractors who pay their crews by the piece. It replaces spreadsheets and paper timesheets with a simple app that tracks piece work, calculates pay instantly, and generates job cost reports. Founded by Tyson Faulkner, a roofing contractor in Post Falls, Idaho.
